description: Mistral AI's 24B model with vision support and strong multilingual chat capabilities.
fullDescription:
## MODEL OVERVIEW ##
Mistral Small 3.2 is a 24B parameter model from Mistral AI with native vision capabilities. It builds on the successful Mistral Small line with added multimodal support.

## Key Features
- **Vision Support**: Process and understand images alongside text
- **24B Parameters**: Strong capability in a single-GPU package
- **Multilingual**: Excellent performance across many languages
- **Fast Inference**: Optimized for responsive chat
- **Function Calling**: Supports tool use and structured outputs

## Specifications
- Parameters: 24B
- Context Length: 128K tokens
- Modalities: Text + Vision
- Disk Size: ~15GB

## Use Cases
- Multimodal chat with image understanding
- Document and image analysis
- Multilingual assistance
- Tool-augmented workflows
- General-purpose AI assistant
modelReadme:
Mistral-Small-3.2-24B-Instruct-2506 is a minor update to Mistral Small 3.1, improving function calling, instruction following, and reducing repetition errors. It features native vision capabilities for processing images alongside text.

Key features:
- Vision support: process and understand images alongside text
- Robust function calling templates
- Better instruction following
- 128K context window
- Strong multilingual performance across 24+ languages
name: mistral-small32-24b
title: Mistral Small 3.2 24B
